page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 60.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.5 GB per core. For acceleration, the instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU containing 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via a bundled 472 GB SSD, and the instance operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a clear contrast between CPU-bound tasks and GPU-accelerated workloads. The CPU performance is relatively modest, with stress-ng single-core scoring in the bottom 10% and multi-core in the bottom 25%. Similarly, Passmark CPU and memory scores fall into the average to weak categories, and database operations like Redis SET operations are in the bottom 25%. However, the integrated NVIDIA P100 GPU delivers strong performance in specific tasks. LLM inference benchmarks show top-tier results in the top 10% for prompt processing on both 135M and 7B models, as well as top-tier text generation speeds for 7B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge offers a budget-friendly entry point for GPU-accelerated computing by utilizing older-generation Pascal hardware. The primary tradeoff is the lower CPU performance and memory bandwidth compared to modern architectures. This server is best suited for workloads that heavily offload computation to the GPU while requiring moderate CPU support, such as small-to-medium LLM inference, basic machine learning training, and GPU-accelerated data processing, rather than CPU-heavy database operations or high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for workloads requiring dedicated hardware acceleration. Powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor, it features 8 dedicated vCPUs, 60.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 472 GB SSD. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. While CPU-bound benchmarks, such as stress-ng and Passmark, place this instance in the lower performance tiers, its GPU capabilities excel in LLM inference, achieving top-tier results for prompt processing and text generation on 7B models. This hardware profile makes the instance a cost-effective choice for GPU-centric tasks, though it presents a tradeoff in raw CPU compute power. It is highly suited for machine learning inference, model prototyping, and GPU-accelerated data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 60 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, optimized for cost-effective LLM inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 8 vCPUs, 60 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU, ideal for cost-effective LLM inference.
tagline: A cost-effective GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and an NVIDIA P100 GPU for efficient model inference.
bullet_points: Equipped with 1x NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM.
Features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 vCPUs and 60 GB RAM.
Includes 472 GB of bundled local SSD storage.
Delivers top-tier performance for 7B LLM inference and prompt processing.
Best suited for GPU-centric workloads, machine learning prototyping, and inference.
